zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Sotherland於1459年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾勒夫 泊時，她的父親William Sothern20歲，母親Alice Spalding15歲。她於1475年與Gregory Clark在英國諾福爾可沙利頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年9月1日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sotherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Sotherland was born in 1459, in Low Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Sothern, was 20 and her mother, Alice Spalding, was 15. She married Gregory Clark in 1475, in Sharrington, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 1 September 1490, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Sotherland est née en 1459, à Low Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Sothern, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice Spalding, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Gregory Clark en 1475, à Sharrington, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1490, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

Sie hat 1475 in Sharrington, Norfolk, England Gregory Clark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. September 1490 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sotherlandが1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロウ ムールで生まれた時，父William Sothernは20歳，母Alice Spaldingは15歳であった。1475年にイギリスノーフォルクシャリントンでGregory Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年9月1日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sotherland(이)가 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로 무어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sothern(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Spalding(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 노르폴크 샤링턴에서 Gregory Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Sotherland родилась в 1459 г. в местности лоу мур, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Sothern было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Spalding, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gregory Clark в 1475 г. в местности шаррингтон, норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 сентября 1490 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
